may_2026.title: CBSE Result Aane Se Pehle Har Student 😰
may_2026.script:
Hi mai Chinu hu aaj tujhe bataunga result anxiety ke baare mein jo har student feel karta hai.
Bhai result aane se pehle neend nahi aati, khana nahi khaya jaata. Parents ke sawaal se darr lagta hai, bc.
Phone pe refresh refresh refresh karte raho. Server crash ho jaye toh aur anxiety. Saala CBSE ka server bhi tujhe ghost karta hai.
Marks predict karte raho - yeh toh easy tha, yeh toh galat ho gaya. Khud ka calculator ban gaye ho, bsdk.
Dost se pucho uska kaisa gaya - agar uska accha gaya toh aur depression. Comparison ka chakkar, saale.
Aur sabse worst? Log poochenge kitne aaye. Tera marks public property ban jayega.
Par sun, marks define nahi karte tujhe. Elon Musk average student tha, maa kasam. Chill kar aur follow for more!

may_2026.title: NEET Ke 1 Din Pehle Kya Kare? 🔥
may_2026.script:
Hi mai Chinu hu aaj tujhe bataunga NEET ke ek din pehle kya karna chahiye.
Bhai ek din pehle naya topic mat padh. Jo nahi aata woh ab nahi aayega, bc. Accept kar le saale.
Sirf revision kar - formulas, diagrams, important reactions. Notes dekh apne, naye videos mat dekh.
Raat ko jaldi so ja. 8 ghante neend le. Sleep deprived brain kuch yaad nahi rakh sakta, bsdk.
Exam center ka route pehle se dekh le. Kal bhatak gaya toh game over. Google Maps pe trust mat kar.
Admit card, ID proof, pen, pencil sab ek jagah rakh de aaj raat. Subah dhundhega toh panic hoga, saale.
Aur last mein - tu taiyaar hai. Itne mahine padhai ki hai. Confidence rakh aur perform kar, maa kasam. All the best! Follow for more!

may_2026.title: JEE Main vs Advanced - Real Difference 🎯
may_2026.script:
Hi mai Chinu hu aaj tujhe bataunga JEE Main aur Advanced mein asli farak kya hai.
Bhai JEE Main mein speed chahiye - 75 sawaal 3 ghante mein. Fast calculation, bc.
JEE Advanced mein dimaag chahiye - conceptual depth. Har sawaal mein twist hoga, saale.
Main mein MCQ hote hain mostly. Advanced mein numerical value type bhi - calculator allowed nahi, bsdk.
Main clear karna relatively easy - top 2.5 lakh qualify karte hain. Advanced mein sirf top 10,000 IIT jaate hain.
Main ke liye NCERT kaafi hai mostly. Advanced ke liye HC Verma, Irodov padho - rote raho, saale.
Par dono mein consistency chahiye. Daily 6-8 ghante minimum. Shortcut nahi hai, maa kasam. Follow for more!
